manual_evidence_observed: Official free API documents approved products and approval records
notes: Useful to verify approvals after the fact but not a point-in-time PDUFA trading calendar.

manual_evidence_observed: Official free API provides trial records and trial metadata
notes: Useful for trial context but not sufficient for FDA decision timing or PDUFA event direction.

manual_evidence_observed: Official FDA public calendars are meeting/activity calendars
notes: Not a product-specific tradable PDUFA calendar.

manual_evidence_observed: Official filings can timestamp issuer disclosures when companies file PDUFA-related releases
notes: Good legal timestamp layer but cannot guarantee complete catalyst universe.

manual_evidence_observed: Issuer pages can show pre-event PDUFA date announcements such as Agios Jan 8 2025 for Sept 7 2025
notes: Can validate individual event date knowledge but not complete unbiased panels.

manual_evidence_observed: Public page says historical report includes target dates extensions CRLs and AdCom votes but free view is limited
notes: Promising because it mentions CRLs/extensions but free page does not prove full PIT/export.

manual_evidence_observed: Public page claims PDUFA calendar CSV export and 2200+ historical FDA decisions
notes: Promising but needs export sample retention and timestamp audit.

manual_evidence_observed: Public page claims 27079 events tracked and official-source links plus confidence ratings
notes: Promising discovery source but includes AI-detected/estimated dates and disclaimers; needs audit.

manual_evidence_observed: Public page shows historical/current/future catalyst rows with outcomes
notes: Useful for manual discovery but no observed stable PIT/export/retention contract.

manual_evidence_observed: Public page says data from SEC EDGAR and ClinicalTrials.gov and tracks outcomes
notes: Useful for discovery; source methodology does not by itself satisfy PIT completeness.
